LГј Xing е‘ӮиҲҲ
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
LГј Xing (е‘ӮиҲҲ). Rebels due to demands placed on him by Sun Xiu. Killed by Li Tong. LГј Xing was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom and the Wei Kingdom.
